mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, satellite_id, sensor_id, date, time, name, resolution, type, bands, cloud, topleftlatitude, topleftlongitude, toprightlatitude, toprightlongitude, bottomleftlatitude, bottomleftlongitude, bottomrightlatitude, bottomrightlongitude, centerlongitude, centerlatitude, area, level, filessize
mapper.select:
select
from htht_dms_sate_data_info
select ST_AsText(ST_Union(ST_GeometryFromText(#{geomjsona}), ST_GeometryFromText(#{geomjsonb})))

select hd.id, hd.satellite_id, hd.sensor_id, hd.date, hd.time, hd.NAME, hd.resolution, hd.type, hd.bands, hd.cloud, hd.topleftlatitude, hd.topleftlongitude, hd.toprightlatitude, hd.toprightlongitude, hd.bottomleftlatitude, hd.bottomleftlongitude, hd.bottomrightlatitude, hd.bottomrightlongitude, hd.centerlongitude, hd.centerlatitude, hd.LEVEL, hd.pngtopleftlatitude, hd.pngtopleftlongitude, hd.pngtoprightlatitude, hd.pngtoprightlongitude, hd.pngbottomleftlatitude, hd.pngbottomleftlongitude, hd.pngbottomrightlatitude, hd.pngbottomrightlongitude, hf.id AS png_id, hf.id AS small_png_id, hf.file_url AS png_url, hf.file_url AS small_png_url from htht_dms_sate_data_info hd left join htht_dms_sate_data_file_info hf on hd.id = hf.data_id where hf.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update htht_dms_sate_data_info
id = #{id},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
satellite_id = #{satelliteId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sensor_id = #{sensorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
date = #{date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
time = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resolution = #{resolution,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bands = #{bands,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cloud = #{cloud,jdbcType=INTEGER},
topleftlatitude = #{topleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
topleftlongitude = #{topleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
toprightlatitude = #{toprightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
toprightlongitude = #{toprightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomleftlatitude = #{bottomleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomleftlongitude = #{bottomleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomrightlatitude = #{bottomrightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomrightlongitude = #{bottomrightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
centerlongitude = #{centerlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
centerlatitude = #{centerlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
area = #{area,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
filessize = #{filessize}
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into htht_dms_sate_data_info
id, create_time, update_time, satellite_id, sensor_id, date, time, name, resolution, type, bands, cloud, topleftlatitude, topleftlongitude, toprightlatitude, toprightlongitude, bottomleftlatitude, bottomleftlongitude, bottomrightlatitude, bottomrightlongitude, centerlongitude, centerlatitude, area, level, filessize
values
#{item.id}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.satelliteId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sensorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.resolution,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.bands,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.cloud,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.topleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.topleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.toprightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.toprightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.bottomleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.bottomleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.bottomrightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.bottomrightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.centerlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.centerlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.area,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.filessize}

id, satellite_id, sensor_id, date, time,cloud
values

update.foreach:
update htht_dms_sate_data_info
id = #{item.id},
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
satellite_id = #{item.satelliteId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sensor_id = #{item.sensorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
date = #{item.date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
time = #{item.time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resolution = #{item.resolution,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bands = #{item.bands,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cloud = #{item.cloud,jdbcType=INTEGER},
topleftlatitude = #{item.topleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
topleftlongitude = #{item.topleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
toprightlatitude = #{item.toprightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
toprightlongitude = #{item.toprightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomleftlatitude = #{item.bottomleftlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomleftlongitude = #{item.bottomleftlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomrightlatitude = #{item.bottomrightlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
bottomrightlongitude = #{item.bottomrightlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
centerlongitude = #{item.centerlongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
centerlatitude = #{item.centerlatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
area = #{item.area,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
level = #{item.level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
filessize = #{item.filessize}
where id = #{item.id}

mapper.update:
insert into htht_dms_sate_data_info
id,
create_time,
update_time,
satellite_id,
sensor_id,
date,
time,
name,
resolution,
type,
bands,
cloud,
topleftlatitude,
topleftlongitude,
toprightlatitude,
toprightlongitude,
bottomleftlatitude,
bottomleftlongitude,
bottomrightlatitude,
bottomrightlongitude,
centerlongitude,
centerlatitude,
area,
level,
filessize
values
id = #{id},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
satellite_id = #{satelliteId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sensor_id = #{sensorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

filessize = #{filessize}

mapper.select: select ST_Area(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(#{covergeojson})) / ST_Area(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(#{areageojson}))

select id from htht_dms_sate_data_info
STR_TO_DATE(date,"%Y-%m-%d") BETWEEN #{beginTime} AND #{endTime}
